race.description: Find Your Eternal Warrior @ The Chase Hcp (Bm78)
race.comment: SEQUISTA (10) frustrating filly unlucky not to have a few more wins on the CV. Warmed up late when sent north for a game seventh over 1200m in the LR Queensland Day Stakes at Eagle Farm. Should get the trip with the winning apprentice going back on. BELLA CORAZON (9) bounced off her good first-up third at Scone, with a well-deserved win over 1300m here with the 52kg last start. Gets a similar set-up today and expected to go close. SWIFTIE HARRIET (8) meets a few of these better at the weights after gripping on from the wide gate to finish a close-up third over 1300m at this track. Stalks the good tempo and can turn the tables. VIRGIL'S GIFT (15) six weeks between runs second-up when she jumped in trip for a courageous third over 1400m at Randwick Kensington. Has the speed to get over from the draw and must be kept safe with the 54kg. MISS KIM KAR (13) blinkers go on and going better than the two runs this time in suggest. Each-way player.
